mapper.select:
SELECT plan_num, plan_qty, plan_status, plan_start, plan_end, emp_num, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count FROM ( SELECT plan_num, plan_qty, plan_status, plan_start, plan_end, emp_num, item_num FROM production_plan
AND plan_num LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ename LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY plan_num DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT facility_num AS num, facility_name AS name FROM facility
SELECT item_num AS num, name AS name FROM item
